description: The learned 'truth of the recipe' for one SetupMode (Article x Machine x Tool x Mode). NOT a scalar: this is a HEAD node that fans out to per-dimension GoldenOutcome posteriors (Achse 1 — what we measure) and to ConditioningEffect random-effects (Achse 2 — under which conditions). Maintained by the golden-engine via Bayesian update; bootstrap_state visualises maturity yellow->green->rich (Konzept §5). Composed outcomes (OEE, revenue) are NOT stored here — they are at-query-time KPI defs in kpis/ per the KPI-execution-by-provenance rule.

attributes.name: golden_id
attributes.description: Unique golden id, 1:1 with a SetupMode

attributes.name: bootstrap_state
attributes.description: yellow = engineering-default/learning, green = n_obs>50 & CI narrowed, rich = mature (§5, §24)

attributes.name: n_obs_total
attributes.description: Total observations folded into the posteriors

attributes.name: mode_active
attributes.description: Whether this is the currently active mode's golden (live drift-detection target)
